text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in the plaza, I spot Air Groove sitting
with her shoulders slumped dejectedly. I approach
her, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't concern you. Don't stick your nose
where it doesn't belong.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I didn't pay enough attention to some of my
flowers, so they withered away.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I allowed myself to become this
lax. What's gotten into me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove's mood doesn't improve for a while.
